headline: Will it arrive in time?
subtext: Tell me your install or reveal date. I'll tell you exactly what's realistic — no guesswork.
footnote: Add any trust or guarantee copy here — e.g. catalog size, build promise, etc.

noDate.label: One thing first
noDate.headline: Pick your date above.
noDate.detail: I need a date to do the math — pop it in and I'll check it instantly.

past.label: Date has passed
past.headline: That date's already behind us.
past.detail: Double check the date — or if plans shifted, run it again with the new one.

clear.label: You're clear
clear.headline: You have {days} days. That's plenty of room.
clear.detail: Even if your piece isn't available yet, we can have it ready and shipped in time — guaranteed.

clearWithNote.label: You're clear, with one note
clearWithNote.headline: {days} days is enough — if your piece is already available.
clearWithNote.detail: If it's in the catalog, it'll ship in {minDays}–{maxDays} days, no problem. If it needs to be made to order, reach out first to confirm.

tight.label: It's tight, but not over
tight.headline: {days} days is close. Available pieces can still make it.
tight.detail: Stick to what's already in the catalog — skip anything that needs to be made to order for this deadline.

tooTight.label: Talk to us first
tooTight.headline: {days} days is very tight.
tooTight.detail: This may still be possible depending on current stock. Reach out directly with your date and we'll tell you straight whether it's realistic before you commit.
